title: TooMuchRain
description: Gives players more control over Minecraft weather patterns
body:
![Banner image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DszXW8xO/images/7ef2cddd9255904fae6c26120c789671ae2b182c.png)

Gives players more control over Minecraft weather patterns through an easy to use config file


## Archival disclosure
**This mod is abandoned and has been uploaded for archival purposes. It was [originally created](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/toomuchrain) Jul 1, 2014 by [dmillerw](https://twitter.com/dylanstweets). It has been uploaded to Modrinth under the ModrinthArchives account with permission from the original author.**

[![Twitter screenshot showing permission to upload](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HZ86TWPN/images/f1581803ab0400111d86749dc19f8de6224021bb.png)](https://twitter.com/dylanstweets/status/1531782875342721024)
